title: GPT 5.6 banned, Fable banned… it’s actually over.
summary: David Ondrej reports that GPT 5.6 and Fable have been banned, framing this as a significant turning point in AI. The video title suggests regulatory action has substantially impacted advanced model availability.
writeup: David Ondrej reports that two systems, GPT 5.6 and Fable, have been banned, presenting the development as a major turning point for AI. The framing points to regulatory action as the cause, with restrictions affecting the availability of advanced models. The central claim is that governance and regulatory restriction now directly limit access to frontier systems.
